sessions_sample.parsing_note: Distance range needs to be handled correctly to extract upper bound.
Intensity description needs to be parsed separately from duration.

sessions_sample.raw: 3 x 1 minute at 9 out of 10 effort
sessions_sample.parsing_note: Multiple intervals with intensity need to be parsed correctly.
Warm-up duration needs to be recognized and stored.
Race day needs to be identified and treated as a special session.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The term 'ish' may confuse the parser as it suggests uncertainty in distance.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Handle distance terms with 'ish' as approximate and extract the numeric part.

unhandled_patterns.issue: The period at the end may cause the parser to misinterpret the end of the session text.
unhandled_patterns.suggested_rule: Ignore punctuation at the end of session descriptions when parsing.

prompt_improvements: Recognize and extract intensity descriptions separately from duration in session text.
Handle distance terms with 'ish' as approximate and extract the numeric part.
Ignore punctuation at the end of session descriptions when parsing.
anomalies: The plan includes both specific distances and ranges, which may require different parsing logic.
